title: LootDrops
description: This is a LootDrop Mod! It adds only One Command!
body:
📦 Loot Drops (Universal)

Take your server events to the next level! Loot Drops is a lightweight but powerful administrative tool that allows Operators to spawn high-tier supply crates anywhere in the world.
🌟 Ultimate Mod Compatibility

This mod is designed to be fully universal. It doesn't matter which mods you are running; Loot Drops can handle them all:

Cross-Mod Support: You can spawn items from ANY other mod (e.g., Thermal Expansion, Twilight Forest, etc.) simply by using their ID in the command.

Modpack Ready: Perfect for server owners who want to create custom events using items from various different mods.

Smart Search: The command automatically detects if an item belongs to Minecraft, your own mod, or a third-party mod.

🚀 Features

5 Rarity Levels: Choose between Common, Uncommon, Rare, Legendary, and Mythic.

Global Alerts: Every drop is announced in chat with custom colors and a dragon's growl sound to alert all players.

Visual FX: Drops land with a flash and explosion particles to make them stand out.

Admin Friendly: Operators receive a welcome message with a command guide upon joining.

🛠 How to use

Only players with Operator (OP) Permissions can use the command:

/lootdrop <rarity> <x> <z> [optional: item_name amount ... ]

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e314e56ac47f6533e3e45abca7217733c8cff2e4.png)

Pro Tip: To spawn items from other mods, just use the format modid:item_name (e.g., draconicevolution:draconium_ingot).
💎 Default Loot Table

If no items are specified, the mod uses built-in rewards:

Common/Uncommon/Rare: Iron, Gold, or Diamonds.

Legendary/Mythic: Enchanted Golden Apples and specialized gear.

Installation Note: This mod must be installed on both the Server and the Client.
